title: Quests
description:
Currently Work in Progress!

A fully datapack-powered quest system for Minecraft 1.21.5, inspired by Origin Realms.
Engage with villagers through an immersive dialogue system and complete a wide variety of quests and tasks.
body:
![Minecraft Quests Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5439588e48787bd8826fa2abe375e8aa94c9a3f8.png)
**⚠️ CURRENTLY ON HOLD! Currently waiting for the inclusion of new Data Pack features announced for 1.21.6 to simplify the codebase.**

**💡 FOR IDEAS & QUEST YOU WOULD LIKE TO SEE - CHECK OUT MY [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/B4AzEPrxkm)**

A fully datapack-powered quest system for Minecraft 1.21.5, inspired by Origin Realms.
Engage with villagers through an immersive dialogue system and complete a wide variety of quests and tasks.

- Interact with Villagers
- Accept Quests
- Gain balanced Rewards

**The release date will be pushed back to allow for a larger volume of quests!**
Till the release multiple smaller Data Packs will be released which are adding stand-alone features on top of the quest system.
